text: 4103 > R B <@ - e B n o & on L af & o 506 G B e oz G 06 & S §) T gk ARt G e i 65 6055 v 1 125K £ 2408 i 2.z PR © G35 (55 Dl ‘When the prayers are over, remember Allah—whether you are standing, sitting, or lying down. But when you are secure, establish regular prayers. Indeed, performing prayers is a duty on the believers at the appointed times.
